personal.name: Aryan Singh Butola
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.shortBio: Building high-scale search infrastructure and LLM-powered features at InfoEdge (Naukri.com). 1.5 years of production experience across Java, Python, Elasticsearch, and AWS. Morgan Stanley Hackathon Winner.
personal.bio: Software Engineer with experience in backend development, data engineering, and cloud-native services. Skilled in Python, Java, MySQL, Elasticsearch, Docker, and Kubernetes. Proven ability to optimize performance, build scalable systems, and work in cross-functional teams. Achieved top rankings in competitive programming and hackathons.

projects.title: Refrain Addiction (Morgan Stanley CTG Hackathon Winner)
projects.description:
Refrain Addiction is a mental health and addiction recovery platform built for the Morgan Stanley CTG'23 Hackathon — winning among 200+ teams nationally.

Engineered Python-based backend services for processing user mental health assessments, cutting counselor evaluation time by 40%.
Designed and exposed RESTful APIs to support real-time anonymous chat, AI-assisted guidance, and session management.
Built scalable service abstractions in Java backed by MongoDB to ensure modular growth of the platform.
Focused on production-readiness: clean code structure, separation of concerns, and extensible API contracts.

projects.title: CalmSpace – AI-Powered Wellness App (Freelance project)
projects.description: Developed Java backend services for mood tracking, anonymous chat, and AI-assisted insights. Designed modular APIs using the MERN stack and integrated the Google Gemini API for extensible.

experience.description:
At InfoEdge, I own the backend of the iimjobs.com search and indexing pipeline — a high-volume system serving lakhs of job seekers and recruiters daily. My work spans data ingestion, search relevance optimization, and AI-powered profile enhancements.

Architected and maintained scalable Java services that power job and recruiter data indexing at high throughput.
Improved search latency by 20% and reduced Elasticsearch index load by 15% through targeted query and ingestion optimizations.
Built an LLM-based profile summary generation service that parses structured resumes to auto-generate recruiter-facing summaries — directly improving search relevance and candidate discoverability.
Designed data enrichment and field-mapping pipelines to normalize and enhance raw recruiter and job data before indexing.
Maintains platform reliability through proactive production monitoring, performance tuning, and incident resolution.

During my internship at Deloitte, I worked within a distributed engineering team on cloud infrastructure and backend services — gaining hands-on experience with enterprise-grade DevOps and deployment practices.

Designed and deployed cloud-native backend microservices using Docker and Kubernetes on AWS, supporting large-scale data processing pipelines.
Automated CI/CD workflows using Jenkins and Maven, enabling seamless deployments, safe rollbacks, and faster mean-time-to-recovery during incidents.
Actively participated in cross-functional incident response, diagnosing and resolving deployment failures in live distributed environments.
Gained strong familiarity with Linux-based production environments and containerized service orchestration.

education.description: Graduated from NSIT Delhi (one of India's premier engineering institutions) with a B.Tech in Computer Engineering. Built strong foundations in Data Structures & Algorithms, Operating Systems, DBMS, OOP, and Low-Level Design — which directly inform my approach to writing clean, performant backend systems.

content.text: Software Engineer with experience in backend development, data engineering, and cloud-native services. Skilled in Python, Java, MySQL, Elasticsearch, Docker, and Kubernetes. Proven ability to optimize performance, build scalable systems, and work in cross-functional teams. Achieved top rankings in competitive programming and hackathons.
